creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 179857
patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates devel/visualparadigm to version 14.0 build 20170121.

I worked with the upstream project since the latest releases were broken in FreeBSD. They even sent me a preview release for the next build to test on FreeBSD, an os they seem willing to support "officially" starting with the 14.0 release.

Kudos to Rain Wong (visualparadigm team) for making this possible!

Tons of new features and updates. From the website:

- TOGAF ADM Process Navigator
- Actionable Guide Process
- Auto Deliverable Composer
- Auto Versioning And Deliverable Generation
- ArchiMate 3.0 & 2.0 Custom Viewpoints
- ArchiMate 3.0 Diagrams and Viewpoints
...

- Q/A
 * portlint -AC OK
 * poudriere builds for {10.3,11.0}{i386,amd64} OK
